title: PM Cram flashcard (custom deck)
description: A standalone flashcard for content that is not a glossary term (e.g. formulas, mnemonics). Glossary terms do NOT need this — they render as flashcards automatically.

id.description: OPTIONAL. Derived from content by the app when omitted; set one only to pin a correctable identity (kebab-case).

deck.description: Deck name this card belongs to.

tags.description: OPTIONAL finer sub-category tags this card covers (e.g. ['Stakeholders','Communication']); shown as chips on the card. Falls back to `topic` when omitted.

back.description: Answer side. Blank lines separate paragraphs; lines starting with '- ' become bullets.

formula.description: OPTIONAL equation, shown prominently above the answer (e.g. 'CPI = EV / AC').

legend.description: OPTIONAL variable key shown under the formula.

figure.description: OPTIONAL explanatory diagram/graph (same model as guide figures).

svg.description: Inline theme-aware <svg> markup (use currentColor for ink).

image.description: Repo-relative path or absolute URL of a raster image.
